notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the postgresql SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 4 CVEs: CVE-2023-5868, CVE-2023-5870, CVE-2022-41862, CVE-2024-0985.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
